items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.description: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.description: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.description: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.description: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.description: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.description: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
